mnemonics: PANDA: Powerful Analysis 'N' Data Assistant (for remembering pandas is a versatile tool for data manipulation and analysis)
keyPoints: pandas provides two primary data structures: Series (1D) and DataFrame (2D)
DataFrames allow for intuitive data manipulation with labeled rows and columns
The library excels at handling missing data, time series, and various file formats
commonMistakes: Using Python loops instead of vectorized pandas operations for better performance
Modifying a DataFrame without using `inplace=True` or reassigning, leading to no changes
